children.text: Heather has over a decade of experience in architecture and planning. Her experience includes commercial and medical planning in addition to residential. She also contributes strong technological experience to Whitten Associates Inc through her extensive 3D modeling, graphics and construction documents experience.

His background includes single family, multifamily, mixed use, redevelopment and senior projects and has a unique sense of how a projects should be priced and how they will be received in the marketplace.
